## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential marketing partnership and advertising opportunities between GrowthX and DeepAI.](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DeepAI offers various ad formats: contextual in-chat ads, banner ads, and potential for custom solutions](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [DeepAI's audience is broad (similar to ChatGPT), with only \~10% being developers](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [GrowthX is interested in targeted developer outreach and SEO/backlink opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [DeepAI has significant traffic: 32M views, 7M+ active users in last 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

## Topics

### DeepAI's Current Advertising Ecosystem

  - [Ad-funded business model with banner ads and contextual in-chat ads](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Multiple ad tech companies integrated, competing for ad space](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Contextual ads appear in chat stream, targeted based on conversation content](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Banner ads managed through providers like Freestar (non-contextual)](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [32M views, 7.5M+ active users in last 30 days (via Google Analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Audience similar to ChatGPT, with only \~10% developers (contrary to initial assumptions)](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

### Potential Partnership Opportunities

  - [GrowthX interested in developer-focused advertising and SEO/backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [DeepAI open to custom solutions for sufficient budget](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Glossary/docs pages potential area for collaboration (though originally built for DeepAI's own SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [GrowthX considering \~$20-30K/month experiment budget (client spends \~$30K/day on ads)](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Ad Integration Options

  - [Complex integration: Become a bidder, write code to place bids on specific messages](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Easier option: Work with existing integrated ad tech companies for traditional campaign setup](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Custom solutions possible for significant budgets (e.g., targeted banners for specific user types/pages)](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### SEO and Content Collaboration

  - [DeepAI's glossary/docs originally built for SEO, now accept paid links](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Potential to update/improve glossary content quality](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [GrowthX to evaluate traffic (via SEMrush) and propose collaboration terms](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review ad providers shared by DeepAI](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze SEO opportunities and propose glossary collaboration terms](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider contextual in-chat ad bidding](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Explore custom advertising solutions if budget allows](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [DeepAI to await GrowthX's proposals for potential partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/ziwRB5vThxv8n9g8ieqGjGS725UusisU?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
